mapper.sql: a.id, a.store_id, a.product_number, a.commodity_type, a.product_title, a.subtitle, a.label, a.scan, a.product_class, a.imgurl, a.content, a.richList, a.sort, a.mch_sort, a.add_date, a.upper_shelf_time, a.volume, a.initial, a.s_type, a.num, a.min_inventory, a.status, a.brand_id, a.is_distribution, a.is_default_ratio, a.keyword, a.weight, a.weight_unit, a.distributor_id, a.freight, a.is_zhekou, a.separate_distribution, a.recycle, a.gongyingshang, a.is_hexiao, a.hxaddress, a.active, a.mch_id, a.mch_status, a.refuse_reasons, a.search_num, a.show_adr, a.publisher, a.is_zixuan, a.commodity_str, a.source, a.comment_num, a.cover_map, a.class_sort, a.display_position_sort, a.is_presell, a.supplier_superior, a.lower_remark, a.outage_time, a.pro_param, a.pro_introduce, a.examine_time, a.violation_time, a.receiving_form, a.zixuan_id, a.video, a.pro_video, a.real_volume, a.lower_image, a.write_off_settings, a.write_off_mch_ids, a.is_appointment, a.supplier_status, a.is_zc, a.country_num, a.lang_code, a.lang_pid,
mapper.select:
select count(1) from ( select a.id from lkt_living_product c left join lkt_product_list a on c.pro_id = a.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS b ON a.mch_id = b.id
group by a.id order by a.sort desc, a.add_date desc ) z;

where.trim:
AND a.store_id = #{store_id} AND a.recycle = 0 AND a.is_presell = 0 AND a.gongyingshang = '' and a.status = 2 and a.mch_status = 2 and a.commodity_type=0 and ifnull(b.commission,'') ='' and b.num > 0 and ifnull(b.commission,'') !='' and a.num>0
#{pro_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
AND a.product_class like CONCAT('%-', #{product_class},'-%')
AND a.brand_id = #{brand_id} AND (a.product_title like CONCAT('%', #{product_title},'%') or a.id=#{product_title})
AND m.name like CONCAT('%', #{mchName},'%')
AND (m.name like CONCAT('%', #{mchNameOrProductName},'%') or a.product_title like CONCAT('%', #{mchNameOrProductName},'%'))
and a.mch_id=#{mch_id}

mapper.select:
select a.id from lkt_product_list a left join lkt_configure b on a.id=b.pid left join lkt_mch m on m.id = a.mch_id
group by a.id

where.trim:
AND a.store_id = #{store_id} AND a.recycle = 0 AND a.is_presell = 0 AND a.gongyingshang = ''
AND (l.recycle = 0 or l.recycle = 1)
AND l.recycle = 0
and ifnull(b.commission,'') = '' and ifnull(b.commission,'') !='' AND a.product_class like CONCAT('%-', #{product_class},'-%')
AND a.brand_id = #{brand_id} AND (a.product_title like CONCAT('%', #{product_title},'%') or a.id=#{product_title} or m.name like CONCAT('%',#{product_title},'%') )
and a.mch_id=#{mch_id} and l.living_id=#{room_id} and m.name like CONCAT('%', #{mchName},'%')

mapper.select:
select a.* from lkt_living_product l left join lkt_product_list a on l.pro_id = a.id left join lkt_configure b on l.config_id=b.id left join lkt_mch m on m.id = a.mch_id
group by a.id
